visual_inventory.subject: Razeen Shaheed — faux.thinker AI avatar (same studio + wardrobe as Video 2 & 3)
visual_inventory.backdrop: warm-LED plant shelf, trailing pothos, hexagonal wall panels, chair back bottom-left
visual_inventory.gesture: moderate — hands enter frame occasionally around t=5s and t=30s (the 'pick two or three' beat). Slightly less gesture-density than Video 3, more than Video 2.

beats.vo: Their CEO just endorsed the tool supposedly killing them.
The takes were instant. Canva dead, Figma cooked, design tools over.
Except Canva's own CEO is quoted in the launch. Export to Canva is a named feature.
beats.function: one-two punch: the CEO + the named feature

beats.vo: It's not a replacement. It's a pipeline. The ones who survive AI plug into it.
Not panic about it. Stop ditching tools every time something new drops. Pick two or three that play nice and ship.
I'm running pitch decks through Claude Design into my Canva brand kit this week. Which tool are you keeping in 2026? Drop it below.

known_whisper_mishears_corrected.occurrences: beat 8 — matches Canva connector's 'Generate pitch decks and presentations' feature

canva_ceo_quote.author: Melanie Perkins — Co-Founder and CEO of Canva
canva_ceo_quote.quote_excerpt: We're excited to build on our collaboration with Claude, making it seamless for people to bring ideas and drafts from Claude Design into Canva, where they instantly become fully editable and collaborative designs ready to refine, share, and publish.

benchmark_quote.author: Brilliant
benchmark_quote.quote: Our most complex pages, which took 20+ prompts to recreate in other tools, only required 2 prompts in Claude Design.

canva_connector_actions: autofill brand templates with custom content

v12_2_components_that_apply: SplitStackBroll for Claude Design + Canva CEO quote screenshots
Light-leak transitions between beats (7 beat boundaries available)
CommentPromptCard for CTA (open question, not DM-gated)
ComparisonCard with toggle ("CANVA DEAD" vs "CANVA ALIVE")
net_new_components_this_reel_needs: HotTakesFeed — scrolling viral-take timeline for beat 4 ("Canva dead, Figma cooked, design tools over")
QuoteCard — authoritative pull-quote card with Melanie Perkins + Canva logo + photo slot (beat 5)
ExportChipRow — animated chip row [PDF, PPTX, HTML, → Canva] with the Canva chip igniting in brand colors (beat 5)
PipelineDiagram — L→R arrow flow: [Claude Design] → [Canva] → [Ship] with small logos (beats 6 & 8)
StackShipCard — 3-tile tool stack with "+ SHIP" stamp (beat 7 "pick two or three")
DeadTakeStrikethrough — draw-on red strike across the word "DEAD" in the hook (beat 1). Lifted from the Nick-1 negation-slash pattern in our audit set.
BrandKitReveal — Canva brand-kit card showing faux.thinker logos + red swatch + Archivo Black + Inter (beat 8, visual proof of the "brand kit this week" claim)
YearToggleCard — 2024/2025/2026 chip row with 2026 glowing (beat 8 CTA framing)

if_anime_hook_requested: Anime scene: a tombstone labelled 'CANVA' with the Canva logo, then it cracks open and Melanie Perkins-style anime character rises from it holding a Claude Design tablet. 4-6 s. Matches 'Stop saying Canva is dead.'

Anime scene: three anime-style tech tools ('CANVA', 'FIGMA', 'CLAUDE DESIGN') standing in a line-up like team members; the Claude one shakes hands with the Canva one while the Figma one steps back. Matches 'pipeline' framing.
Simpler motion-graphics route (no Veo cost): giant 'CANVA DEAD' lower-third with red slash drawing across 'DEAD', shatter-glass transition reveals the Canva CEO quote card. All-Remotion, $0.

asset_gaps_before_render: Scrape Anthropic Claude Design announcement page (hero + Melanie Perkins quote + export-format list)
Scrape claude.com/connectors/canva page (connector actions list + Canva branding)
Fetch Canva logo (brand-approved wordmark, SVG preferred)
Fetch Brilliant logo (for the 20→20 prompts benchmark quote — optional)
Optionally generate anime hook via Veo 3 Fast (~$0.90) if user opts in
